subject: Adapt NBI robot healthcheck to HTTPS
commit_message:
Adapt NBI robot healthcheck to HTTPS

Issue-ID: EXTAPI-415

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I9caaf093c56bf6a6b0d7564dca7485cec811cb22

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 3 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Looks good to me, in association with Sylvains oom/+/103779 merge

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
